title: Traditional British Bangers and Mash
description: A hearty British dish featuring sausages and mashed potatoes. Perfect comfort food for a chilly evening.
instructions: 1. Boil the potatoes in salted water until tender.
2. Drain the potatoes and mash with butter, salt, and pepper.
3. Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium heat.
4. Add sliced onions and cook until softened.
5. Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add bangers and cook until browned on all sides.
7. Remove bangers from the pan and set aside.
8. Sprinkle flour over the pan and cook for 1 minute.
9. Gradually add milk, whisking continuously, until the gravy thickens.
10. Add gravy granules and stir to combine.
11. Serve bangers on top of mashed potatoes with the onion gravy.
